FROM momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE
WHERE date BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-03-31'
GROUP BY usecase
ORDER BY number_of_users DESC

column2: Số người dùng có giao dịch trong tháng 1 năm 2024 và vẫn tiếp tục giao dịch trong tháng 2 năm 2024
column4:
WITH January_Transactions AS (
SELECT DISTINCT user_id
FROM momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE
WHERE date BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-01-31'
),
February_Transactions AS (
SELECT DISTINCT user_id
FROM momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE
WHERE date BETWEEN '2024-02-01' AND '2024-02-29'
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT January_Transactions.user_id) AS number_of_users
FROM January_Transactions
JOIN February_Transactions
ON January_Transactions.user_id = February_Transactions.user_id
column6:
WITH Jan_2024_Transactions AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT user_id
    FROM `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE`
    WHERE DATE_TRUNC(date, MONTH) = '2024-01-01'
),
Feb_2024_Transactions AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT user_id
    FROM `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE`
    WHERE DATE_TRUNC(date, MONTH) = '2024-02-01'
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS user_count
FROM Jan_2024_Transactions j
JOIN Feb_2024_Transactions f
ON j.user_id = f.user_id;

column2: Số lượng tập người dùng hardcore trong tháng 2 năm 2024
column5: Vui lòng định nghĩa tập hardcore
column6:
WITH transactions_feb_2024 AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    DATE(date) as tran_date
  FROM `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE`
  WHERE
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = 2024
    AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) = 2
),
daily_transactions AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT tran_date) as days_active
  FROM transactions_feb_2024
  GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) as hardcore_users_count
FROM daily_transactions
WHERE days_active = 29 -- Tháng 2 năm nhuận có 29 ngày

column2: Chênh lệch số lượng người dùng hiện tại phân bổ tại Hà Nội là bao nhiêu trong tháng 4 2024 và tháng 5 2024?
column4:
SELECT
COUNT(DISTINCT core.user_id) AS user_count,
DATE_TRUNC(core.date, MONTH) as month
FROM momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE AS core
JOIN momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_DEMOGRAPHIC AS demo
ON core.user_id = demo.user_id
WHERE demo.city = 'Hà Nội'
AND core.date BETWEEN '2024-04-01' AND '2024-05-31'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(core.date, MONTH)
ORDER BY month;
column6:
WITH ActiveUsers AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT core.user_id
  FROM `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE` core
  JOIN `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_DEMOGRAPHIC` demo
  ON core.user_id = demo.user_id
  WHERE demo.city = 'Hà Nội' 
    AND core.date BETWEEN '2024-04-01' AND '2024-05-31'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM core.date) = 2024 
    AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM core.date) IN (4, 5)
),
UserCount AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM core.date) AS month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT core.user_id) AS user_count
  FROM ActiveUsers au
  JOIN `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE` core
  ON au.user_id = core.user_id
  GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM core.date)
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT user_count FROM UserCount WHERE month = 5) -
  (SELECT user_count FROM UserCount WHERE month = 4) AS user_diff
column7:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM t.date) = 5 THEN t.user_id END) -
     COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM t.date) = 4 THEN t.user_id END)) AS user_difference
FROM 
    `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE` t
JOIN 
    `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_DEMOGRAPHIC` d
ON 
    t.user_id = d.user_id
WHERE 
    d.city = 'Hà Nội' AND 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t.date) = 2024 AND 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM t.date) IN (4, 5);
column8:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS user_count, 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) AS month
FROM 
    `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE` AS tc
JOIN 
    `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_DEMOGRAPHIC` AS td
ON 
    tc.user_id = td.user_id
WHERE 
    td.city = 'Hà Nội' 
    AND DATE(date) BETWEEN '2024-04-01' AND '2024-05-31'
GROUP BY 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date)
ORDER BY 
    month
LIMIT 10;
column9:
WITH user_counts AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC(date, MONTH) AS month,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t.user_id) AS user_count
    FROM
        `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE` t
    JOIN
        `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_DEMOGRAPHIC` d
    ON
        t.user_id = d.user_id
    WHERE
        d.city = 'Hà Nội'
        AND date BETWEEN '2024-04-01' AND '2024-05-31'
    GROUP BY
        DATE_TRUNC(date, MONTH)
)
SELECT
    (SELECT user_count FROM user_counts WHERE month = '2024-05-01') - 
    (SELECT user_count FROM user_counts WHERE month = '2024-04-01') AS user_difference
;
column10:
WITH users_april AS (
  SELECT user_id
  FROM `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE`
  JOIN `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_DEMOGRAPHIC` USING (user_id)
  WHERE city = 'Hà Nội' AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) = 4 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = 2024
  GROUP BY user_id
),
users_may AS (
  SELECT user_id
  FROM `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE`
  JOIN `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_DEMOGRAPHIC` USING (user_id)
  WHERE city = 'Hà Nội' AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) = 5 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = 2024
  GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users_april) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users_may) AS difference
column12:

column14:
WITH users_by_month AS (
  SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(t.date, MONTH) as month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.user_id) as user_count
  FROM `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE` t
  JOIN `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_DEMOGRAPHIC` d
  ON t.user_id = d.user_id
  WHERE 
    d.city_group = 'Hà Nội'
    AND t.date BETWEEN '2024-04-01' AND '2024-05-31'
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(t.date, MONTH)
)
SELECT 
  ABS(MAX(CASE WHEN month = '2024-05-01' THEN user_count END) - 
      MAX(CASE WHEN month = '2024-04-01' THEN user_count END)) as user_difference
FROM users_by_month;

column2: Retention rate of MoMo users in 2025
column4:
with mau AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT date_trunc(date, month) as month, user_id 
  FROM `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE`
), pre_month AS (
  SELECT month, user_id
         , LEAD(month, 1) OVER(PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY month) as lead_month
  FROM mau
)
SELECT month
       , COUNT(DISTINCT IF(DATE_DIFF(lead_month, month, month)=1, user_id, null)) as retain
       , COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as cur
       , COUNT(DISTINCT IF(DATE_DIFF(lead_month, month, month)=1, user_id, null))/COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as retention_rate
FROM pre_month
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1 DESC

WITH monthly_active_users AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    user_id,
    DATE_TRUNC(date, MONTH) as month
  FROM `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE`
  WHERE 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = 2024
    AND user_id IS NOT NULL
),
retention_calculation AS (
  SELECT
    current_month.month as current_month,
    next_month.month as next_month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT current_month.user_id) as total_users,
    COUNT(DISTINCT next_month.user_id) as retained_users
  FROM monthly_active_users current_month
  LEFT JOIN monthly_active_users next_month
    ON current_month.user_id = next_month.user_id
    AND next_month.month = DATE_ADD(current_month.month, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
  GROUP BY current_month.month, next_month.month
  ORDER BY current_month.month
)
SELECT
  FORMAT_DATE('%B %Y', current_month) as month,
  total_users,
  retained_users,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(retained_users, total_users) * 100, 2) as retention_rate_percentage
FROM retention_calculation
WHERE current_month < DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE(), MONTH)

column2: Cohort rate of MoMo users in 2024
column4:
WITH neww as (
  SELECT user_id, MIN(DATE_TRUNC(date, month)) as first_month
  FROM `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE`
  GROUP BY 1
), curr as (
  SELECT DISTINCT user_id, DATE_TRUNC(date,month) as active_month
  FROM `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE`
), pre_final as (
  SELECT curr.user_id, curr.active_month, neww.first_month, DATE_DIFF(curr.active_month, neww.first_month, month) as month_diff
  FROM curr
  LEFT JOIN neww USING(user_id)
), frs as (
  SELECT first_month, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as user
  FROM neww
  GROUP BY 1
), final as (
  SELECT first_month, month_diff, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS user
  FROM pre_final
  GROUP BY 1,2
)
SELECT final.*, frs.user as first_user, final.user/frs.user as cohort_rate
FROM final
LEFT JOIN frs USING(first_month)
ORDER BY final.first_month, final.month_diff

column6:
WITH initial_users AS (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        MIN(DATE(date)) AS first_transaction_date
    FROM 
        `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE`
    WHERE
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM DATE(date)) = 2024
    GROUP BY 
        user_id
),
cohort_activity AS (
    SELECT
        iu.user_id,
        EXTRACT(MONTH FROM iu.first_transaction_date) AS cohort_month,
        EXTRACT(MONTH FROM DATE(t.date)) AS active_month,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t.tranid) AS transaction_count
    FROM
        initial_users AS iu
    JOIN
        `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE` AS t
    ON 
        iu.user_id = t.user_id
    WHERE
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM DATE(t.date)) = 2024
    GROUP BY
        iu.user_id, cohort_month, active_month
)
SELECT
    cohort_month,
    active_month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS active_users,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)) OVER (PARTITION BY cohort_month) AS retention_rate
FROM
    cohort_activity
GROUP BY
    cohort_month, active_month
ORDER BY
    cohort_month, active_month;

WITH user_first_transaction AS (
  SELECT 
    user_id,
    DATE_TRUNC(date, MONTH) as cohort_month,
    MIN(DATE_TRUNC(date, MONTH)) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id) as first_month
  FROM `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.iDeA_TRANS_CORE`
  WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = 2024
),
cohort_size AS (
  SELECT 
    first_month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as cohort_users
  FROM user_first_transaction
  GROUP BY first_month
),
retention_by_month AS (
  SELECT 
    first_month,
    cohort_month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as active_users,
    DATE_DIFF(cohort_month, first_month, MONTH) as month_number
  FROM user_first_transaction
  GROUP BY first_month, cohort_month
)
SELECT 
  r.first_month,
  r.month_number,
  c.cohort_users,
  r.active_users,
  ROUND(100.0 * r.active_users / c.cohort_users, 2) as retention_rate
FROM retention_by_month r
JOIN cohort_size c ON r.first_month = c.first_month
WHERE r.month_number >= 0
ORDER BY r.first_month, r.month_number;

WITH network_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    cate as network,
    COUNT(*) as transaction_count,
    SUM(amount) as total_amount
  FROM `project-5400504384186300846.BU_UTILITIES_TELCO.AIRTIME_DETAILS`

    AND statusid = 2
    AND cate IS NOT NULL

  transaction_count,

  ROUND(transaction_count * 100.0 / SUM(transaction_count) OVER(), 2) as percentage_of_transactions
FROM network_counts
ORDER BY transaction_count DESC;

from raw t1
left join

 using (user_id)
column8:
WITH single_usecase_users AS (
    SELECT
        USER_ID,
        DATE_TRUNC(MONTH, MONTH) AS MONTH
    FROM
        `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.MAU_BY_USECASE_VER2`
    WHERE
        USECASE_TYPE = '1 USECASE'
),
next_month_usecase_users AS (
    SELECT
        USER_ID,
        DATE_TRUNC(DATE_ADD(MONTH, INTERVAL 1 MONTH), MONTH) AS NEXT_MONTH
    FROM
        `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.MAU_BY_USECASE_VER2`
    WHERE
        USECASE_TYPE = '2 USECASE' OR USECASE_TYPE = 'FROM 4 USECASE'
)
SELECT
    su.MONTH,
    COUNT(DISTINCT su.USER_ID) AS USER_COUNT
FROM
    single_usecase_users su
JOIN
    next_month_usecase_users nu ON su.USER_ID = nu.USER_ID AND su.MONTH = nu.NEXT_MONTH
GROUP BY
    su.MONTH
ORDER BY
    su.MONTH
LIMIT 10;
column10:
WITH single_use_case_users AS (
    SELECT 
        USER_ID,
        MONTH,
        COUNT(DISTINCT USECASE_TYPE) AS usecase_count
    FROM `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.MAU_BY_USECASE_VER2`
    WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM MONTH) = 2024
    GROUP BY USER_ID, MONTH
    HAVING usecase_count = 1
),
multi_use_case_users_next_month AS (
    SELECT 
        a.USER_ID,
        a.MONTH AS current_month,
        b.MONTH AS next_month,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b.USECASE_TYPE) AS next_month_usecase_count
    FROM single_use_case_users a
    JOIN `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.MAU_BY_USECASE_VER2` b
    ON a.USER_ID = b.USER_ID
    AND DATE_TRUNC(b.MONTH, MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(DATE_ADD(a.MONTH, INTERVAL 1 MONTH), MONTH)
    GROUP BY a.USER_ID, a.MONTH, b.MONTH
    HAVING next_month_usecase_count > 2
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) AS total_users
FROM multi_use_case_users_next_month;

    HAVING usecase_count = 1
),
multi_use_case_users_next_month AS (
    SELECT 
        a.USER_ID,
        a.MONTH AS current_month,
        b.MONTH AS next_month,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b.USECASE_TYPE) AS next_month_usecase_count
    FROM single_use_case_users a
    JOIN `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.MAU_BY_USECASE_VER2` b
    ON a.USER_ID = b.USER_ID
    AND DATE_TRUNC(b.MONTH, MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(DATE_ADD(a.MONTH, INTERVAL 1 MONTH), MONTH)
    GROUP BY a.USER_ID, a.MONTH, b.MONTH
    HAVING next_month_usecase_count > 2
)

column2: Số user overlap 2 merchant Google và Facebook của cate ADS PAYMENT, và % số lượng users trong tổng users mỗi merchant trong tháng 10 năm 2024
column4:
with merchant_type as (
select distinct user_id, merchant
from `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1`
where month >= '2024-04-01' and month <= '2024-06-01' and cate = 'ADS PAYMENT'
and merchant in ('TIKTOK','GOOGLE','FACEBOOK')
),
final as (
select distinct
user_id,
STRING_AGG (MERCHANT, "-" ORDER BY MERCHANT) as type_merchant
from merchant_type
group by 1
)

select type_merchant, count (distinct user_id)
from final
group by 1
order by 1
column8:
WITH user_overlap AS (
    SELECT 
        a.USER_ID,
        a.MERCHANT AS MERCHANT_A,
        b.MERCHANT AS MERCHANT_B
    FROM 
        `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.DLS_MONTHLY_USER_TYPE_BY_MERCHANT_V3` a
    JOIN 
        `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.DLS_MONTHLY_USER_TYPE_BY_MERCHANT_V3` b
    ON 
        a.USER_ID = b.USER_ID
    WHERE 
        a.MERCHANT != b.MERCHANT
),

overlap_stats AS (
    SELECT
        u.USER_ID,
        SUM(t.GMV) AS TOTAL_GMV,
        COUNT(t.USER_ID) AS TOTAL_TRANS,
        SUM(t.TOTAL_REV) AS TOTAL_REV
    FROM
        user_overlap u
    JOIN
        `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1` t
    ON
        u.USER_ID = t.USER_ID
    GROUP BY
        u.USER_ID
),

merchant_gmv AS (
    SELECT
        MERCHANT,
        SUM(GMV) AS GMV
    FROM
        `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1`
    GROUP BY
        MERCHANT
)

SELECT
    u.MERCHANT_A,
    u.MERCHANT_B,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.USER_ID) AS TOTAL_OVERLAP_USERS,
    SUM(o.TOTAL_GMV) AS TOTAL_GMV,
    SUM(o.TOTAL_TRANS) AS TOTAL_TRANS,
    SUM(o.TOTAL_REV) AS TOTAL_REV,
    (SUM(o.TOTAL_GMV) / mg1.GMV) * 100 AS PERCENT_GMV_A,
    (SUM(o.TOTAL_GMV) / mg2.GMV) * 100 AS PERCENT_GMV_B
FROM
    user_overlap u
JOIN
    overlap_stats o
ON
    u.USER_ID = o.USER_ID
JOIN
    merchant_gmv mg1
ON
    u.MERCHANT_A = mg1.MERCHANT
JOIN
    merchant_gmv mg2
ON
    u.MERCHANT_B = mg2.MERCHANT
GROUP BY
    u.MERCHANT_A,

WITH merchant_users AS (
SELECT
USER_ID,
MERCHANT
FROM
momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1
WHERE
DATE_TRUNC(DATE, MONTH) = '2024-10-01'
AND CATE = "ADS PAYMENT"
AND MERCHANT IN ("FACEBOOK", "GOOGLE")
GROUP BY
USER_ID,
MERCHANT
),
overlap_users AS (
SELECT
USER_ID
FROM
merchant_users
GROUP BY
USER_ID
HAVING
COUNT(DISTINCT MERCHANT) > 1
),
total_users_per_merchant AS (

MERCHANT,
COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) AS total_users
FROM
merchant_users
GROUP BY
MERCHANT
)
SELECT
m.MERCHANT,
COUNT(DISTINCT o.USER_ID) AS overlap_user_count,
(COUNT(DISTINCT o.USER_ID) / t.total_users) * 100 AS overlap_user_percentage

JOIN
merchant_users m ON o.USER_ID = m.USER_ID

total_users_per_merchant t ON m.MERCHANT = t.MERCHANT
GROUP BY
m.MERCHANT, t.total_users
ORDER BY
overlap_user_percentage DESC
LIMIT 25;

column2: Số user overlap 2 merchant Google và Facebook của cate ADS PAYMENT, và %GMV và Revenue của nhóm users đó trên tổng GMV và Revenue của tổng users của mỗi merchant đó trong tháng 10 năm 2024
column4:
WITH OVERLAP_USER AS (
  SELECT 
    USER_ID, 
    SUM(GMV) AS GMV_OVERLAP,
    SUM(NET_REV) AS REV_OVERLAP
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1`
  WHERE CATE = 'ADS PAYMENT' 
    AND MERCHANT IN ('FACEBOOK', 'GOOGLE')
    AND MONTH = '2024-10-01'
  GROUP BY USER_ID
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT MERCHANT) = 2
),
TOTAL_GMV_REV AS (
  SELECT
    MERCHANT, 
    SUM(GMV) AS TOTAL_GMV, 
    SUM(NET_REV) AS TOTAL_REV
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1`
  WHERE CATE = 'ADS PAYMENT' 
    AND MERCHANT IN ('FACEBOOK', 'GOOGLE')
    AND MONTH = '2024-10-01'
  GROUP BY MERCHANT
),
TOTAL_OVERLAP AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(USER_ID) AS TOTAL_USER_OVERLAP, 
    SUM(GMV_OVERLAP) AS TOTAL_GMV_OVERLAP,
    SUM(REV_OVERLAP) AS TOTAL_REV_OVERLAP
  FROM OVERLAP_USER
)
SELECT 
  TOTAL_USER_OVERLAP,
  ROUND((TOTAL_GMV_OVERLAP / (SELECT TOTAL_GMV FROM TOTAL_GMV_REV WHERE MERCHANT = 'FACEBOOK')) * 100, 2) AS GMV_PERCENT_FACEBOOK,
  ROUND((TOTAL_REV_OVERLAP / (SELECT TOTAL_REV FROM TOTAL_GMV_REV WHERE MERCHANT = 'FACEBOOK')) * 100, 2) AS REV_PERCENT_FACEBOOK,
  ROUND((TOTAL_GMV_OVERLAP / (SELECT TOTAL_GMV FROM TOTAL_GMV_REV WHERE MERCHANT = 'GOOGLE')) * 100, 2) AS GMV_PERCENT_GOOGLE,
  ROUND((TOTAL_REV_OVERLAP / (SELECT TOTAL_REV FROM TOTAL_GMV_REV WHERE MERCHANT = 'GOOGLE')) * 100, 2) AS REV_PERCENT_GOOGLE
FROM TOTAL_OVERLAP

intersect

),
google_metrics as (

count(distinct user_id) as total_google_users,
sum(gmv) as total_google_gmv,
sum(net_rev) as total_google_rev
from momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1
where DATE_TRUNC(date, month) = '2024-10-01' and cate = 'ADS PAYMENT' and merchant = 'GOOGLE'
),
facebook_metrics as (
select
count(distinct user_id) as total_facebook_users,
sum(gmv) as total_facebook_gmv,
sum(net_rev) as total_facebook_rev
from momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1
where DATE_TRUNC(date, month) = '2024-10-01' and cate = 'ADS PAYMENT' and merchant = 'FACEBOOK'
)

count(distinct o.user_id) as overlap_user_count,
sum(case when t1.merchant = 'GOOGLE' then t1.gmv end) as overlap_google_gmv,
sum(case when t1.merchant = 'FACEBOOK' then t1.gmv end) as overlap_facebook_gmv,
(sum(case when t1.merchant = 'GOOGLE' then t1.gmv end) / g.total_google_gmv) * 100 as percent_overlap_google_gmv,
(sum(case when t1.merchant = 'FACEBOOK' then t1.gmv end) / f.total_facebook_gmv) * 100 as percent_overlap_facebook_gmv,

sum(case when t1.merchant = 'FACEBOOK' then t1.net_rev end) as overlap_facebook_rev,
(sum(case when t1.merchant = 'GOOGLE' then t1.net_rev end) / g.total_google_rev) * 100 as percent_overlap_google_rev,

join overlap_users o on t1.user_id = o.user_id
cross join google_metrics g
cross join facebook_metrics f
where DATE_TRUNC(t1.date, month) = '2024-10-01'
limit 25

WITH overlap_users AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT USER_ID
  FROM momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(DATE, MONTH) = '2024-10-01'
  AND CATE = 'ADS PAYMENT'
  AND MERCHANT IN ('GOOGLE', 'FACEBOOK')
  GROUP BY USER_ID
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT MERCHANT) = 2
),
merchant_metrics AS (
  SELECT 
    MERCHANT,
    COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) as total_users,
    SUM(GMV) as total_gmv,
    SUM(NET_REV) as total_revenue
  FROM momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(DATE, MONTH) = '2024-10-01'
  AND CATE = 'ADS PAYMENT'
  AND MERCHANT IN ('GOOGLE', 'FACEBOOK')
  GROUP BY MERCHANT
),
overlap_metrics AS (
  SELECT 
    t.MERCHANT,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.USER_ID) as overlap_users,
    SUM(t.GMV) as overlap_gmv,
    SUM(t.NET_REV) as overlap_revenue
  FROM momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1 t
  INNER JOIN overlap_users o ON t.USER_ID = o.USER_ID
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(t.DATE, MONTH) = '2024-10-01'
  AND t.CATE = 'ADS PAYMENT'
  AND t.MERCHANT IN ('GOOGLE', 'FACEBOOK')
  GROUP BY t.MERCHANT
)

SELECT 
  m.MERCHANT,
  o.overlap_users,
  ROUND(o.overlap_gmv/m.total_gmv * 100, 2) as overlap_gmv_percentage,
  ROUND(o.overlap_revenue/m.total_revenue * 100, 2) as overlap_revenue_percentage
FROM merchant_metrics m
JOIN overlap_metrics o ON m.MERCHANT = o.MERCHANT
ORDER BY m.MERCHANT;

WITH both_services_users AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT USER_ID
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1`
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(DATE, MONTH) = '2024-11-01'
  AND USER_ID IS NOT NULL
  AND SUB_MERCHANT IN ('GRAB-ENDUSER', 'BE GROUP')
  GROUP BY USER_ID
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT SUB_MERCHANT) = 2
),
logistics_users AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) as total_logistics_users
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1`
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(DATE, MONTH) = '2024-11-01'
  AND CATE = 'LOGISTICS'
  AND USER_ID IS NOT NULL
),
overlap_count AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) as overlapped_users
  FROM both_services_users
)
SELECT 
  l.total_logistics_users,
  o.overlapped_users,
  ROUND(o.overlapped_users * 100.0 / l.total_logistics_users, 2) as overlap_percentage
FROM logistics_users l
CROSS JOIN overlap_count o

column4:
WITH RANK_TEST AS(
SELECT DISTINCT 
    USER_ID,
    BU_NAME,
    CATE,
    MERCHANT,
    CASE WHEN SUB_MERCHANT = 'APPLE ICLOUD' THEN 'm4becomadyen_apple.icloud'
          WHEN SUB_MERCHANT = 'APPLE YOUTUBE PREMIUM' THEN 'm4becomadyen_apple.youtube'
          ELSE SERVICE_CODE END AS SERVICE_CODE,
    ORDER_ID,
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(DATETIME),MONTH) AS MONTH,
    DATE(DATETIME) AS DATE,
    DATETIME,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY USER_ID ORDER BY DATETIME ASC) AS RANK_MOMO,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY USER_ID,CATE ORDER BY DATETIME ASC) AS RANK_CATE,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY USER_ID,MERCHANT ORDER BY DATETIME ASC) AS RANK_MERCHANT,
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1` 
)
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT NTMC)
FROM(
SELECT 
  USER_ID,
  CATE,
  MERCHANT,
  ORDER_ID,
  MONTH,
  DATE,
  DATETIME,
  CASE WHEN RANK_MOMO = 1 then USER_ID END AS NTMM,
  CASE WHEN RANK_CATE = 1 then USER_ID END AS NTC,
  CASE WHEN RANK_MERCHANT = 1 then USER_ID END AS NTMC,

  CASE WHEN RANK_MOMO = 1 then DATE END AS DATE_NTMM,
  CASE WHEN RANK_CATE = 1 then DATE END AS DATE_NTC,
  CASE WHEN RANK_MERCHANT = 1 then DATE END AS DATE_NTMC,  

FROM RANK_TEST
)
WHERE MONTH = '2024-11-01' AND MERCHANT = 'TIKTOK'  AND CATE = 'MARKETPLACE'

WITH previous_users AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT USER_ID
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1`
  WHERE MERCHANT = 'TIKTOK'
  AND DATE < '2024-11-01'
),

november_users AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT USER_ID
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1`
  WHERE MERCHANT = 'TIKTOK'
  AND DATE >= '2024-11-01'
  AND DATE < '2024-12-01'
)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT n.USER_ID) as new_users_count
FROM november_users n
LEFT JOIN previous_users p
ON n.USER_ID = p.USER_ID
WHERE p.USER_ID IS NULL;

with light_user as (
  select distinct user_id
  from `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.USER_SPENDING_SEGMENT_BY_CATE_V3`
  where month between '2024-04-01' and '2024-06-01' and cate = 'ADS PAYMENT' and USER_SEGMENT = '3. Light'
)

select 
  month,
  count (distinct t2.user_id) as total_user,
  count (distinct order_id) as total_trans,
  sum (net_rev) as rev,

  count (distinct case when cate = 'ADS PAYMENT' then t2.user_id end) as ad_user,
  count( distinct case when cate = 'ADS PAYMENT' then order_id end) as ads_trans,
  sum (case when cate = 'ADS PAYMENT' then net_rev end) as ads_rev

from light_user t1
inner join `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1` t2 using (user_id)
where month >= '2024-04-01' and month <= '2024-06-01'
group by 1
order by 1

SELECT 
  user_spend.USER_ID, 
  SUM(user_spend.GMV) AS total_gmv, 
  SUM(user_spend.TRANS) AS total_trans
FROM 
  `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.USER_SPENDING_SEGMENT_BY_CATE_V3` AS user_spend
JOIN 
  `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1` AS trans
  ON user_spend.USER_ID = trans.USER_ID 
  AND user_spend.CATE = trans.CATE
WHERE 
  user_spend.CATE = 'ADS PAYMENT'
  AND user_spend.USER_SEGMENT = '3. Light'
  AND trans.DATE BETWEEN '2024-04-01' AND '2024-06-30'
GROUP BY 
  user_spend.USER_ID
ORDER BY 
  total_gmv DESC
LIMIT 10;

WITH active_users AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT USER_ID
  FROM `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1`
  WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM DATE) = 3 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM DATE) = 2024
),
inactive_users AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT US.USER_ID, US.USER_SEGMENT
  FROM `momovn-mimir.MIMIR.USER_SPENDING_SEGMENT_BY_CATE_V3` US
  LEFT JOIN active_users AU ON US.USER_ID = AU.USER_ID
  WHERE AU.USER_ID IS NULL AND US.MONTH = '2024-03'
)
SELECT USER_SEGMENT, COUNT(USER_ID) AS INACTIVE_USER_COUNT
FROM inactive_users
GROUP BY USER_SEGMENT
ORDER BY INACTIVE_USER_COUNT DESC;

WITH active_users AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT USER_ID
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1`
  WHERE MONTH = '2024-03-01'
),
all_segmented_users AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT USER_ID, USER_SEGMENT
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.USER_SPENDING_SEGMENT_BY_CATE_V3`
  WHERE MONTH = '2024-03-01'
  AND USER_SEGMENT IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  USER_SEGMENT,
  COUNT(DISTINCT u.USER_ID) as inactive_users
FROM all_segmented_users u
LEFT JOIN active_users a ON u.USER_ID = a.USER_ID
WHERE a.USER_ID IS NULL
GROUP BY USER_SEGMENT
ORDER BY USER_SEGMENT;

column14:
WITH all_users_money_sources AS (
  SELECT 
    DISTINCT USER_ID,
    MONTH,
    MONEY_SOURCE
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_ECOM.DLS_ALL_TRANS_V3_1`
  WHERE MONTH BETWEEN '2024-02-01' AND '2024-05-01'
),

only_banklink_users AS (
  SELECT 
    USER_ID,
    MONTH
  FROM all_users_money_sources a
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM all_users_money_sources b 
    WHERE a.USER_ID = b.USER_ID 
    AND a.MONTH = b.MONTH 
    AND b.MONEY_SOURCE != 2
  )
  AND MONEY_SOURCE = 2
)

SELECT 
  MONTH,
  COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) as user_count
FROM only_banklink_users
GROUP BY MONTH
ORDER BY MONTH
